Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: SH assistant website flow — Telegram bridge + Supabase Realtime

- request/route.ts: skickar uppgifter via Telegram Bot API till clawdbot-sh
  (WebSocket fungerar ej från Vercel serverless)
- request/route.ts: sparar tasks i Supabase istf in-memory Map
- status/route.ts: läser från Supabase istf mock/in-memory
- callback/route.ts: uppdaterar clawdbot_tasks → triggar Realtime
- ChatWidget.tsx: Supabase Realtime subscription — öppnar och notifierar
  automatiskt när hemsida är klar. Tar bort VPS-statuskoll (alltid Online)
- 016_clawdbot_tasks.sql: ny tabell för persistent task-tracking + Realtime

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Crunchbase RSS as Track A source

Fetches news.crunchbase.com/feed/ and applies two pre-screens:
1. Funding signal words (raises, seed, series a, etc.)
2. Crypto/web3 keywords (crypto, blockchain, defi, web3, etc.)

Surfaces crypto companies that CryptoRank misses (e.g. fintech
companies building on crypto rails). Articles passed to Gemini for
structured extraction — activates automatically when GEMINI_ENABLED=True.

commit.message:
#1079 Add API contract test criteria for frontend stories (#1081)

## Issue

Closes #1079

## 概要

フロントエンドが既存 API を呼び出す Story で、API
契約（フィールド名・型）の不一致を検出するための判定基準を3つのルールファイルに追加。改善記録の次のアクションも更新。

## 品質確認

- 参照の網羅性: 改善記録の3対策すべてに対応するファイルを変更。改善記録の次のアクションに Issue 番号を記載
- 用語の統一: 既存ルールファイルの用語（エンコーダ/デコーダ、OpenAPI 仕様、フィールド名）と一致
- 意図の明確さ: 各変更が「フロントエンドが既存 API を呼び出す場合の検証漏れ防止」を伝えている
- `just check` + CI pass: Markdown のみの変更。DynamoDB
統合テスト失敗は既存の環境依存問題（今回の変更と無関係）

## 確認項目

- [x] `dev-flow-tdd.md` のテスト層該当条件テーブルに判定基準を追加
- [x] `pre-implementation.md` のカテゴリ2に API 境界フィールド突合を追加
- [x] `dev-flow-issue.md` の品質チェックリストの仕様突合項目にフロントエンド検証を追加
- [x] 改善記録の次のアクションを Issue 番号付きで更新

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

docs: add v3 plan — TG bot, Yandex Music, admin panel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve RAG pipeline returning empty results (3 root causes)

1. LanceDB path mismatch: 4 retrieval nodes hardcoded db_path="~/.lancedb"
   but data lives at backend/data/lancedb. Fixed to use LANCEDB_CONFIG.

2. Vectorizer cold-start timeout: embedding model loads ~500ms on first call
   but search timeout was 400ms, causing silent timeout. Fixed by pre-loading
   vectorizer during LanceDBClient.initialize().

3. Response mapping mismatch: RAG endpoint read result.get("results") but
   LangGraph state uses "reranked_results". Also fixed latency_ms mapping
   from individual state keys to response dict.

Additional fixes:
- video_processor.py: "from src.agentic_rag" → "from agentic_rag" (broke
  MultimodalVectorizer import chain)
- fuse_results: 5→6 source fusion, added vault_notes with 0.20 weight
- config.py default: "backend/data/lancedb" → "data/lancedb" (CWD-relative)

commit.message:
feat: deal reveal sequence, UX polish & session rejoin fixes

Game flow improvements:
- DealRevealOverlay: cards revealed in random order then auto-sort by suit before transition to bidding
- DealingOverlay: animated flying cards from center deck toward each player's seat
- All-pass bid now re-triggers shuffling phase (same dealer) instead of immediate redeal

UI / UX polish (Minors 1-6):
- TeamScoreHUD visible during all table phases (not just playing), with always-visible scoreboard button
- "Your turn" pulse indicator for local player during bidding and playing
- Teammate / opponent badges once all partners are revealed
- Unplayable cards dimmed (brightness 0.75, no pop-out animation) instead of semi-transparent
- Hand zoom now triggers on card hover, not on the whole hand-area div

Session & rejoin fixes:
- onConnect.js: auto-join socket to game room and push personalised game state on every reconnect
- GamePage: request game state on socket connect event as safety net against race conditions

fix: remove versioned runtime from vercel.json — let Vercel auto-detect @vercel/node

The 'runtime' field requires a full versioned package string (e.g. '@vercel/node@5.0.2').
Removing it lets Vercel auto-detect the Node.js runtime for TypeScript API routes.
Also remove outputDirectory which is not needed for a serverless API-only project.

Caption-first pipeline: og:description scrape fallback + try caption extraction before transcription

RapidAPI often returns no caption for Instagram posts. Added og:description
scrape fallback in the downloader so captions are always available. Pipeline
now tries caption-only extraction first — if items are found, skips the
expensive transcribe/correct/vision steps entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix IndexError in protein_name_desc() due to off-by-one (#22) (#25)

random.randint(a, b) is inclusive on both ends, so using
len(protein_names) as the upper bound could return an index equal to
the list length, causing an IndexError. Fixed by using len() - 1.

Adds a regression test that calls protein_name_desc() 1000 times to
reliably expose the error before the fix.

Add live ocean data pipeline and vector analysis layers

- marlin_data.py: Copernicus Marine pipeline fetching SST, currents, chlorophyll-a; SST front/isotherm detection via Sobel gradient; chlorophyll edge detection (log-scale); current vector decimation; GEBCO bathymetry contour extraction
- requirements.txt: Python dependencies for pipeline
- data/: Placeholder GeoJSON files for sst_fronts, chl_edges, currents, bathymetry_contours (populated by pipeline)
- index.html: Four new GeoJSON sources and 10 new map layers — SST fronts (orange), isotherms with °C labels (blue/purple by species), chlorophyll edges (green dashed), current vectors (cyan), GEBCO bathymetry contours (200/500/1000m); third button row for analysis layer toggles; updated marlin legend

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: non-local return (^) inside blocks in class methods (BT-1202) (#1246)

## Summary

Fixes a bug where `^` (non-local return) inside a block in a class
method did not return from the method — execution continued to the next
statement, returning the last expression instead.

**Root cause:** Class method codegen did not set up NLR (non-local
return) infrastructure. Without a token + try/catch wrapper, `^` inside
a block closure was compiled as a plain value rather than a throw, so
the block returned normally and execution continued.

**Fix:** Detect blocks containing `^` in class method bodies
(`expr_has_block_nlr`), set `current_nlr_token` to enable throw
generation, and wrap the method body in a try/catch via
`wrap_class_method_body_with_nlr_catch`. The NLR throw uses the current
`ClassVars` snapshot as state (matching how value type methods use
`Self{N}`).

## Key changes

- `mod.rs`: Added `wrap_class_method_body_with_nlr_catch` — analogous to
`wrap_actor_body_with_nlr_catch` but returns `NlrVal` directly (or
`{class_var_result, NlrVal, NlrState}` for classes with class variables)
- `mod.rs`: `Expression::Return` codegen now checks `in_class_method`
first when selecting the NLR throw state, using `ClassVars` rather than
the actor state variable
- `gen_server/methods.rs`: `generate_class_method_functions` now detects
NLR need and wraps method bodies accordingly
- 3 new fixture files + 1 test file with 5 BUnit tests

## Test plan

- [x] `testNlrFromClassMethodIfTrue` — `^` exits class method via
`ifTrue:` block
- [x] `testNlrFromClassMethodIfTrueFallthrough` — no `^` taken, falls
through to `nil`
- [x] `testNlrFromClassMethodBothBranches` — `^` in both
`ifTrue:ifFalse:` branches
- [x] `testNlrFromClassMethodDoBlock` — `^` inside `do:` exits class
method immediately
- [x] `testNlrFromClassMethodDoBlockNoMatch` — no match, falls through
to `nil`
- [x] All 913 existing BUnit tests passing

Linear: https://linear.app/beamtalk/issue/BT-1202

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai
-->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **New Features**
* Support non-local return (^) inside class methods across conditionals,
blocks, iterations, and when class variables are mutated; class-variable
state is preserved on early returns.
  * No changes to public/exported API signatures.

* **Tests**
* Added tests and fixtures covering class-method non-local returns,
class-var interactions, fallthrough cases, and do-block scenarios.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

---------

fix: allow esbuild build scripts in pnpm v10

pnpm v10 blocks postinstall scripts by default. esbuild needs its
postinstall to download platform binaries. Without it, tsx crashes
on startup, causing Railway health check to fail silently.

commit.message:
docs: Add v0.6.0 spec and COMPUTE bottleneck analysis (work.md) (#107)

* feat(ca): v0.5.0 The Great Rebalancing — cure SENSOR monoculture

v0.4.0 overshot into SENSOR monoculture (92.9% SENSOR, H=0.19).
The asymmetric stability was too extreme — SENSOR invincible while
STRUCTURAL had no survival window.

Key rebalances:
- STRUCTURAL buffed: survives at 0-2 neighbours (was: none)
- COMPUTE buffed: wider stable band 1-3 (was: only 1)
- SENSOR nerfed: stable 0-6 only (was: 0-8 invincible)
- VOID nucleation widened: 3-6 (was: 4-6)
- Contagion symmetrized: ENERGY/SENSOR recruit equally (0.34/0.34)
- Decay gentled: 2.5% structural decay (was: 4.5%), 6-step threshold (was: 4)

Physics by Jack (GPT-5.4) + AURA (Gemini). Integration by Claude.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Add v0.6.0 spec and COMPUTE bottleneck analysis (work.md)

Shared memory document for the Trinity workflow (Claude/Nemo/Jack).
Contains: v0.5.0 baseline telemetry, root cause analysis of the
1% COMPUTE bottleneck, 6 tuneable physics levers for Nemo, integration
spec and safety checklist for Jack, clustering deep dive, and target
goals for v0.6.0 "The COMPUTE Awakening".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Semantic labels via trained cell classifier (#22) (#22)

Add automatic detection of row/column header labels for formula cells using
a RandomForest classifier trained on 16.8M cells from CTC (CIUS/SAUS) and
ENTRANT (18-K, 10-KT, 485BPOS, 497, S-1) datasets. 96% accuracy on held-out
eval set. Labels appear as top-k=5 nearest candidates in YAML output.

- New labeler.py: classifier-based cell role detection + bisect header scanning
- reader.py: extract merged cells, bold cells; return 3-tuple with label_map
- serializer.py/cli.py: emit labels block in YAML output
- Model: 50 trees, depth 10, 1.8MB (scikit-learn + joblib)
- Training script + benchmark script in scripts/
- THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES: CTC (MIT) + ENTRANT (CC-BY-4.0) attribution
- Updated all docs (EN + JA) for new output format and labels feature
- 165 tests, 92% coverage

Co-authored-by: roksechs <roksechs@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

opus-2026-03-08-S41: DT insufficiency at n=6 + circulant census + β_2 structure

Major findings:
- DT sufficiency FAILS at n=6: 960/32768 tournaments need cancellation 3-chains
  Failures have 6 DT-less 4-subsets (3-cycle + dominator pattern)
- Full Ω_3 still gives β_2=0 (cancellation 3-chains are essential)
- Circulant census at n=11: 32 tournaments, NONE have χ=11
  Paley is unique; contractible through dim 4
- dim(Ω_2) = |TT| + Σ(mult-1) formula proved (100% at n=5,6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

   confirmation modal more compact (440px, smaller icon/text)

4. Klippkort upsell banner in booking: checks user.cards for active
   PelviX cards (supports both klippkort with trainingsLeft and
   unlimited memberships). Shows gold banner on calendar/time steps
   linking to webshop page. Configurable via webshopUrl prop.

5. Webshop checkout validation: handleCheckoutComplete now validates
   result data (checks orderconfirmation/orderid) to distinguish
   real purchases from cart clears
